hero.subtitle: We build custom digital solutions that help businesses grow faster.

footer.description: Premium software agency specializing in futuristic, scalable, and high-performance digital solutions.

ecommerce.title: GestInst IIAC — Industrial Instrumentation Asset Management System
ecommerce.description: Full-stack development of a client-server solution for managing industrial instruments. Features a REST API with JWT authentication and role-based access control, a native Android app with inventory, advanced search, and full CRUD functionality, along with a high-performance optimized database.

logistica.title: LottoPattern Analytics
logistica.description: Development of a desktop application in C# (WPF / .NET 8) for statistical analysis of historical lottery data. Features pattern detection algorithms, advanced search, interactive data visualization, and a system for managing custom analyses, optimized for high performance with large datasets.

mireserva.title: MiReserva: Comprehensive Sports Management Platform
mireserva.description: MiReserva is a digital solution designed to modernize how sports complexes manage their schedules and how players interact with them. The project transforms the traditional in-person booking process into a seamless, visual, and automated experience, reducing administrative friction and increasing court occupancy.
